title: ornithogalum tenuifolium subvar. glabrum
intro: Ornithogalum tenuifolium subvar. glabrum, also known as the Ornithogalum or Star of Persia, is a bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Ornithogalum tenuifolium subvar. glabrum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of fever. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from the bulb, which can be dried, powdered, or infused in water to create teas or tinctures for medicinal use.
